checkout.confirmDesc: Please double-check the information below before proceeding to payment:
checkout.warningDesc: Booking information cannot be changed after payment is completed. Please ensure that all passenger details match their official identity documents.
checkout.loginPromoText: Log in to receive offers and manage your bookings more easily.
checkout.passportHint: Passport number may contain letters and numbers.
checkout.citizenIdError: Citizen ID must be exactly 12 digits.
checkout.passportError: Passport must be 6-15 characters and contain only letters and numbers.
checkout.specialReqHint: E.g. vegetarian/food allergies, motion sickness (front seat preferred), mobility assistance, travelling with kids/elderly, special occasions (birthday, honeymoon)…
checkout.specialReqPlaceholder: E.g. I get motion sickness, please seat me near the front.
checkout.specialReqNote: We will do our best to accommodate based on availability; not guaranteed.
checkout.passengerNeedsInfo: No details yet — tap to fill
checkout.deferPassengersTitle: Add the other travelers' details later
checkout.deferPassengersDesc: You only need to fill in the lead traveler's details now. The remaining travelers' information can be completed later under My Bookings, before departure.
checkout.deferDisabledTitle: Departure is near — details required now
checkout.deferDisabledDesc: As the departure date is close, please enter complete details for all travelers now (cannot be completed later).
checkout.staffAssistTitle: I need staff to help enter passenger details
checkout.staffAssistDesc: Ideal for large groups. Just fill in the lead traveler; our staff will contact you to collect and enter the remaining travelers' details.
checkout.staffAssistNoticeTitle: Our staff will contact you shortly to assist
checkout.staffAssistNoticeDesc: Please keep an eye on the phone and email you registered. Our staff will help you complete the remaining travelers' details before departure.
checkout.fillAllTravelers: Fill in all accompanying travelers, then tap Confirm.
checkout.agreeIntro: I have read and agree to the
checkout.goBackDesc: Please go back to the list and select a tour.

errors.fillAll: Please fill in all information for this passenger!
errors.completePassengers: Please complete the details for all travelers.
errors.agreeRequired: Please agree to the Terms of Use and Cancellation & Refund Policy before continuing.
errors.fillContact: Please fill in all Contact Information!
errors.leadData: Please provide all required information for Passenger 1!
errors.invalidOrder: Invalid order, Booking info not found!
errors.loginRequired: Please log in to continue payment!
errors.serverFail: Failed to connect to the server.
errors.paymentCancelledHome: Payment was unsuccessful. Your booking has been saved in 'Pending Payment' status. You can go to 'My Bookings' to complete the payment.
errors.passengerFormIncomplete: Please complete or cancel the passenger form that is currently in progress.
errors.leadIdentityRequired: Please enter the identity document for Passenger 1!
errors.notEnoughSeats: This departure no longer has enough available seats.

soldOut.title: Sorry, these seats just sold out
soldOut.descZero: The last seat was booked by another customer while you were checking out. Please choose another departure date.
soldOut.descRemaining: Another customer just booked seats on this departure, so only {seats} seat(s) remain — not enough for your party. Please choose another date or reduce the number of travelers.

checkout.minOrder: Minimum order must be {amount} to use this voucher
checkout.saleTourNoVoucher: This departure already has a sale price, so vouchers cannot be combined.
checkout.payosDesc: Quick QR-code scan with instant confirmation.
checkout.inStoreDesc: Hold seats for up to 24 hours. Please visit our office to pay.
